raw_consumer_statement: I was the victim of identity theft. I notified CitiBank that I was a victim of identity theft and that there were several fraudulent transactions on my account that I did not authorize. On XX/XX/year>, they replied that the merchant furnished them information confirming merchandise was delivered to my home. The merchant provided information for transactions on my account from six months before the fraud and identity theft occurred. I informed them that I never received any merchandise and I did not authorize the fraudulent transaction. There were four other fraudulent transactions from the same vendor that were refunded, however, CitiBank refused to refund this charge for {$25.00}. On XX/XX/year>, they informed me that they closed their investigation. On XX/XX/year>, pursuant to the Fair Credit Reporting Act, I requested copies of business records that are itemized in this complaint. CitiBank never responded to this request. CitiBank also added derogatory information to my credit bureau report for all three credit agencies even though my account was always paid on time. I believe this was a retaliatory act, since it related to the identity theft fraud.
